progress_summary: Issue #3253 was classified as an implementation gap against SPEC #1935/#3248. Root cause: workflow-policy split heredoc JSON envelope commands down to a lone gwtd segment, so owner-unlinked sessions could not run discovery/linking JSON operations, and harmless echo/printf were not recognized as read-only.
